sentences.text: Before committing, ask AI to argue against its own recommendation: "What would have to be true for the other option to be better?
What's the worst-case scenario for the one you recommended?"
This is the same technique analysts use — deliberately seeking the strongest case against a decision before making it.

It takes two minutes and regularly surfaces the one consideration you hadn't thought of: the early-exit penalty, the rate that resets after the promo period, the assumption about your future that might not hold.
